# datadog_integration_aws_account_ccm_config (Resource)

Provides a Datadog IntegrationAwsAccountCcmConfig resource. This can be used to create and manage Cloud Cost Management configuration for an AWS Account Integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create new integration_aws_account_ccm_config resource

resource "datadog_integration_aws_account_ccm_config" "foo" {
  aws_account_config_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"

  ccm_config {
    data_export_configs {
      report_name   = "cost-and-usage-report"
      report_prefix = "reports"
      report_type   = "CUR2.0"
      bucket_name   = "billing"
      bucket_region = "us-east-1"
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `aws_account_config_id` (String) Unique Datadog ID of the AWS Account Integration Config.

### Optional

- `ccm_config` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ccm_config))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--ccm_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ccm_config`

Optional:

- `data_export_configs` (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ccm_config--data_export_configs))

<a id="nestedblock--ccm_config--data_export_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ccm_config.data_export_configs`

Optional:

- `bucket_name` (String) Name of the S3 bucket where the Cost and Usage Report is stored.
- `bucket_region` (String) AWS region of the S3 bucket.
- `report_name` (String) Name of the Cost and Usage Report.
- `report_prefix` (String) S3 prefix where the Cost and Usage Report is stored.
- `report_type` (String) Type of the Cost and Usage Report.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import datadog_integration_aws_account_ccm_config.foo "<aws_account_config_id>"
```
